name: codeinsight-ai
description: AI 驱动的代码知识提取与可视化分析平台
author: CodeInsight Team

scripts.dev:backend: cd codeinsight-backend && uv run uvicorn codeinsight.main:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000
scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint:backend && npm run lint:frontend
scripts.format: npm run format:backend && npm run format:frontend
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:shared && npm run typecheck:frontend
